2372230.name: Roxy Raccoon's Pinball Panic - Workplace Worries
2372230.description:
2 Brand New Tables with online leaderboards and unlockable cosmetics!

Office themed tables where office workers can fantasize destroying their workplace!

Wonky Workplace

  • Standard sized table.
  • 2 Flippers, 4 Slingshots, 5 Bumpers, 4 Stationary Targets, 4 Drop Targets, 6 Rollovers, 2 Holes.
  • Ball Saver, Kickback, Score Multiplier

Obnoxious Office

  • Ultra-Wide table.
  • 4 Flippers, 2 Multi-Directional Flippers, 2 Slingshots, 5 Bumpers, 11 Stationary Targets, 4 Drop Targets, 8 Rollovers, 2 Raceways.
  • Ball Saver, Extra Ball, Score Multiplier.

Cosmetics

  • Crumpled up Paper Ball: 1 new playable character (the ball handles the same, differences are visual only).
  • 6 Workplace themed accessories.
  • 6 Furs, appropriate for an office worker.
2372230.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 波兰语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 土耳其语, 意大利语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
